description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Zoox vehicle (Vehicle 1) operating in manual mode was traveling northeast on Folsom Street and preparing to turn left onto 6th Street in 
San Francisco. At that time, a passenger car (Vehicle 2), traveling southeast on 6th Street, failed to stop for the red traffic light and entered 
the intersection, approaching the Zoox vehicle attempting a left turn. The front driver’s side of the passenger car collided with the driver-side
 rear wheel area of the Zoox vehicle. The front of the passenger car sustained damage however, the driver left the scene without exchanging 
information. The Zoox vehicle sustained moderate damage to the driver’s side rear wheel, and suspension, and was towed from the scene. 
The police were called to the scene and there were no reported injuries.
Print
Clear Form
